violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -Raw eggs were above vegetables in the walk in cooler. Employee corrected on site.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. -Raw whole cut beef and ground beef stacked together in the walk in cooler.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Ice scoop in the ice machine behind the bar has the handle down in the ice.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
